74468.subject: SpaceX Trades, xStocks Fails to Deliver
74468.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

These are the biggest Web3 news today:

* **[SpaceX](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/spacex-begins-nasdaq-trading-with-tokenized-versions-mirroring-largest-ipo-in-history)**[ opens at $1.77T with tokenized mirrors live](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/spacex-begins-nasdaq-trading-with-tokenized-versions-mirroring-largest-ipo-in-history)

* **[xStocks](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/bybit-binance-bitget-cancel-tokenized-spacex-allocations-xstocks-fails-deliver-shares)**[ fails to deliver shares](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/bybit-binance-bitget-cancel-tokenized-spacex-allocations-xstocks-fails-deliver-shares)

* **[Coinbase](https://thedefiant.io/converge/cefi/coinbase-gold-silver-futures-24-7-trading-us-regulated-oil)**[ launches US-regulated gold and silver futures 24/7](https://thedefiant.io/converge/cefi/coinbase-gold-silver-futures-24-7-trading-us-regulated-oil)

* **[Japan](https://thedefiant.io/converge/regulation/japan-lower-house-crypto-fiea-bill-etf-20-percent-tax)**[ votes to regulate crypto](https://thedefiant.io/converge/regulation/japan-lower-house-crypto-fiea-bill-etf-20-percent-tax)

* **[DeFi](https://thedefiant.io/news/hacks/q2-2026-most-hacked-quarter-defi-70-exploits-746m)**[ logs ~70 Q2 exploits](https://thedefiant.io/news/hacks/q2-2026-most-hacked-quarter-defi-70-exploits-746m)

SpaceX [opened for trading on Nasdaq Friday under ticker SPCX](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/spacex-begins-nasdaq-trading-with-tokenized-versions-mirroring-largest-ipo-in-history), priced at $135 per share and raising $75 billion pre-greenshoe — the largest IPO in history, per Nasdaq and Morgan Stanley. The [tokenized stack that assembled around the listing this week](https://thedefiant.io/newsletter/spacex-goes-public-with-a-live-crypto-tokenized-stack) traded alongside it from the opening bell: Ondo's SPCXon, Backpack's SPCX on Solana, xStocks' SPCXx on decentralized exchanges, Dinari's dShare on Hyperliquid's HyperCore, and pre-IPO perps that converted to tracking the live print.

The one route that broke ran through a middleman. Binance, Bybit and Bitget [canceled their tokenized allocation campaigns and refunded subscribers in full](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/bybit-binance-bitget-cancel-tokenized-spacex-allocations-xstocks-fails-deliver-shares) after xStocks, the tokenized-equity provider that had agreed to source shares for the exchanges, failed to procure them — $557 million unwound at Binance alone. Every product that held the asset onchain or through a broker-dealer delivered. 

Within the same news cycle, Coinbase [took its US-regulated gold and silver futures to 24/7 trading](https://thedefiant.io/converge/cefi/coinbase-gold-silver-futures-24-7-trading-us-regulated-oil), and Japan's lower house [voted to move crypto under its securities law](https://thedefiant.io/converge/regulation/japan-lower-house-crypto-fiea-bill-etf-20-percent-tax). The risk ledger is keeping pace — Q2 [logged a r

Railway

PRODUCT UPDATE

***************
Changelog time!
***************

It's Friday and you know what that means! Here's a summary of the stuff we shipped this week:

74466.subject: Elon Musk Is Now Worth $1,000,000,000,000
74466.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/elon-musk-now-worth-1000000000000-forbes-magazine-himyc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B5JfMgqiWSv68VhSjuH9ZQA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3EX9Ui1Jga0Ik1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqbfjhv5~zh-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqbfjhv5-zh
  
Good evening, Elon Musk became the first trillionaire ever after SpaceX began trading today on the Nasdaq. Musk, chairman, CEO and chief technical officer, owns 4.8 billion shares of the company, and it’s his most valuable asset by far. The idea of anyone becoming a trillionaire seemed unfathomable even just a couple of years ago. Here’s how he did it. SpaceX’s historic IPO means Peter Thiel and other Musk backers could win big. SpaceX is now the eighth largest public bitcoin holder. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads AFP via Getty Images SpaceX Investments Now Dominate The 10 Best VC Checks Of All Time Venture capitalists now have stakes worth hundreds of billions thanks to the record-breaking IPO. Chip Somodevilla via Getty Images Elon Musk's Trillionaire Status Blasted By Lawmakers—Here Are The Strongest Reactions Sen. Bernie Sanders, I-Vt., a longtime advocate for wealth taxes, called for an increase in the cap for taxable income.

74465.subject: 🟪 Making tokens trustworthy
74465.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/f03a31fc-2c5e-45d6-bd19-65971ab1d33b/casper_title.jpg?t=1780689993)
Follow image link: (https://www.casper.network/news/why-casper-for-rwa)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9feec0e1-858c-40e1-8d69-0f2dccdd12c8/Quote_template_-_Breakdown_NL.png?t=1781299556)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9cba5808-5085-408c-8538-6cf4016dc288/image.jpeg?t=1781299312)
Caption: 

# Making tokens trustworthy

It was a consequential day for finance: Blockworks has acquired Messari, creating a new champion of onchain capital markets.

Also, SpaceX went public.

These two things are related!

Raising $75 billion from investors has made SpaceX the largest IPO of all time (by a factor of three). Amazingly, much of the price discovery happened on-chain.  

The IPO was _prix fixe_: investors were offered the shares at $135, take it or leave it — an offer that goes against all precedent and convention. Investment banks typically start with a proposed price range for new shares, then adjust it based on feedback from investors. It’s an opaque process that only institutional customers are privy to.

(Note: Goldman and Morgan Stanley made about [$100 million each](https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/spacex-ipo-stock-market-06-12-2026/card/goldman-and-morgan-stanley-to-pocket-100-million-each-in-spacex-ipo-fees-Fi1SR4wYLWW6Qrl6ayYq) for running that not-so-complicated process.) 

This time, the feedback happened in full view. Pre-IPO perpetual futures trading on Hyperliquid let _everyone_ know where SpaceX was likely to price. 

It may even have influenced the pricing. Did Elon Musk choose $135 because it was 20% below the perps market? Or was the perps market 20% above where it knew Musk would price it? It’s impossible to say.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/fa2fee20-111f-4596-9e9d-b27435e78f07/image.png?t=1781299337)
Caption: 

Either way, the onchain market was active. Over $1.2 billion worth of SpaceX futures traded on Hyperliquid today.

Many people think there is much more of this to come — including some in a position to make it happen. 

Larry Fink, for example, [believes](https://www.cnbc.com/video/2025/10/14/blackrock-ceo-larry-fink-were-at-the-beginning-of-the-tokenization-of-all-assets.html) "we're just at the beginning of the tokenization of all assets.”

_All_ assets. “From real estate to equity to bonds,” he added.

Similarly, SEC Chair Paul Atkins [said](https://x.com/coinbureau/status/1997128653650657338?s=20) in December that “all US markets will be on chain within two years.”

December was six mont
